Notes: Semifinal game of the 2009 NSIC/Sanford Health Basketball Tournament.
CU's Paul Fessler wins his 300th career victory.
CU advances to the Tournament finals where they will face St. Cloud State.
Game.Officials: Anne Nehring,  Amy Brighton,  Mike Klinedinst
